subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who createth whatsoever He willeth by His command, and verily He knoweth that which is in the heavens and that which is on earth. Glorified and exalted be He above all that they describe. O my God! How can I call upon Thee when my sins have encompassed me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی یبدع ما یشاء بامره و انه لیعلم ما فی السموات و ما فی الارض سبحانه و تعالی عما یصفون یا الهی کیف ادعوک و ان ذنوبی قد احاطتنی
subcodes.subjects: @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for forgiveness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
